hero_subtitle: SFTY enables mature digital asset businesses to securely orchestrate multi-vendor compliance workflows with audit-ready evidence and governance for procurement and enterprise readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Procurement slows when compliance models diverge
problem_description: Enterprise teams managing regulatory readiness face challenges when compliance infrastructure relies on siloed vendor tools and inconsistent deployment models. This fragmentation makes it difficult to support secure governance, clear audit trails and consistent vendor neutrality.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects multiple vendor outputs into one controlled compliance operating layer with role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity to streamline governance and enable consistent procurement workflows.
workflow_title: From provider selection to audit-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects multiple compliance providers through controlled workflows, linking procurement inputs to permissions, case management and comprehensive audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another vendor. The provider-neutral layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple compliance providers into a unified operating layer that preserves evidence, records decisions and supports audit-ready workflows without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs requiring controlled governance, audit-ready evidence, and secure enterprise deployment to meet procurement and institutional compliance standards from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP procurement teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY offers a provider-neutral compliance layer that helps VASP procurement teams orchestrate, govern and audit multi-vendor compliance tools securely within enterprise procurement frameworks.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-provider workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from multiple providers into structured workflows, cases, decisions and reports without disrupting existing vendor operations or data flows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence with encryption, access governance and configurable data retention for regulatory inspections and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY support secure, private deployments?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY supports deployment in private clouds or sovereign environments with role-based access controls, audit logging and governance to meet institutional security requirements.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule or screening providers; it integrates their outputs into one auditable compliance operating layer.
final_title: Review secure procurement for compliance control
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports provider-neutral compliance workflows with role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
